items.title: FinRL-X: An AI-Native Modular Infrastructure for Quantitative Trading
items.desc: We present FinRL-X, a modular and deployment-consistent trading architecture that unifies data processing, strategy construction, backtesting, and broker execution under a weight-centric interface. items.title: Can Blindfolded LLMs Still Trade? An Anonymization-First Framework for Portfolio Optimization
items.desc: For LLM trading agents to be genuinely trustworthy, they must demonstrate understanding of market dynamics rather than exploitation of memorized ticker associations.
